author: y4rr
content:
Phase 11 complete. APPROVE-WITH-FOLLOW-UPS. **Vision crate hits 15/15 = 100% torchvision-comparable model parity.**

Outcome: 14 PASS-able vision models -> 15 PASS-able. Swin-T was the last torchvision-comparable model. Phase 11 closes the multi-phase migration that started at 2/14 PASS in Phase 1A.

PASS-able value-parity models after Phase 11 (15/15 = 100%):
1. ResNet18  2. ResNet34  3. ResNet50
4. VGG11     5. VGG16
6. DenseNet121
7. FCN-ResNet50
8. ViT-B/16
9. MobileNetV2 10. MobileNetV3-Small
11. EfficientNet-B0
12. ConvNeXt-T
13. DeepLabV3-ResNet50
14. Inception-V3
15. Swin-T ✓ (NEW — max_abs=3.502e-7, max_rel=1.967e-3)

Single-deliverable rebuild in vision/src/models/swin.rs (885 → 1668 lines):
- ShiftedWindowAttention<T> struct: qkv (Linear fused), proj (Linear), relative_position_bias_table (Parameter), relative_position_index (Vec<i64>, NOT Parameter — integer lookup, no autograd)
- window_partition / window_reverse via view().permute().contiguous() chains (Phase 5 primitives)
- Cyclic shift via ferrotorch_core::ops::tensor_ops::roll
- compute_relative_position_index helper (precomputed at construction)
- build_attn_mask: 9-region (3 H-slices × 3 W-slices) pairwise diff matching torchvision's _compute_attention_mask exactly
- Last-stage shift_size=0 enforcement via runtime guard 'if window_size >= height || window_size >= width: shift_size=0'
- Rebuilt SwinBlock alternating shift_size per block index
- PatchMerging matches torchvision: concat 2×2 → 4C → LayerNorm → Linear(4C, 2C)

172 named_parameters keys diff line-by-line against torchvision swin_t().state_dict().keys().sorted() — zero divergence. NO state_remap function needed. Probe-before-fix landed as permanent regression sentinel: probe_swin_named_params_vs_torchvision.rs.

12 relative_position_bias_table parameters (one per block, dim+num_heads vary per stage) all named-parameter-surfaced and loadable.

Verification (architect):
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision -- swin_t_value_parity: ok (max_abs=3.502e-7, 4 orders of magnitude under tolerance)
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision -- value_parity: 72 passed, 0 failed, **0 ignored** (down from 4 — Phase 11 unignored 4 swin tests)
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision --test probe_swin_named_params_vs_torchvision: 1/1 ok
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision (full): all bins green
- cargo clippy -p ferrotorch-vision -p ferrotorch-nn --tests --all-targets -- -D warnings: clean
- cargo build --workspace: clean
- git diff --stat -- ferrotorch-core/ ferrotorch-gpu/ ferrotorch-nn/: empty
- 14 prior PASSes preserved

Coordination boundaries 100% respected.

Follow-up filed: #1014 (autograd backward for roll, gather, pad — gates full Swin-T TRAINING; eval-mode parity is fully landed and was the Phase 11 acceptance criterion). The pre-flight's 'STOP-AND-REPORT if roll lacks backward' scenario surfaced; per pre-flight contract eval-mode forward sufficed and the gap was filed cleanly.

Closing #998 (Swin-T shifted-window attention) and #1013 (Phase 11 umbrella).
